LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT PLEADS FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE THE FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED AS TO EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC. AND IS NOT UNAMBIGUOUS OR UNINTELLIGIBLE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.10(E-F). BOTH PARTIES' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE ARE GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SCOTT EMBLIDGE, ESQ., 415.362.3599, FOR PLAINTIFFS BENSYM, INC. ET AL.
LENELL TOPOL MCCALLUM, ESQ., 650.903.0500, FOR DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The First Amended Complaint pleads facts sufficient to constitute the five causes of action alleged as to Executive Risk Indemnity Inc. and is not unambiguous or unintelligible pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 430.10(e-f). Both parties' request for judicial notice are granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Continued on the Court's own motion to May 13, 2014. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
